data.body:
CHECKPOINT 4 / PAUSE POINT (2026-07-13). USER PAUSED the session; bot STOPPED (emergency-stop sentinel at /var/gerrit/site/autolander/emergency-stop; phase=idle, 0 errors). 

EPIC f1fa STATE: 15a1 drive-path fix LANDED (#652, on main as 4d9caeff7) + DEPLOYED (build confirmed, _is_fast_forward_reject present) + bot was resumed and ran clean (0 errors) — the 15a1 incident is RESOLVED. Closed+signed: 38be(S5d), ea61(S5b), 0525(S3), 0ee8(S2). NOT yet closed: 3c55(S5 story) [all children closed - ready to close], epic f1fa [ready after 3c55], bugs dc33 + 15a1 + 85c3 + 0d3e.

dc33 (annotation) — 4 layers found, first 3 fixed+landed (#643 id/store, #648 freshen). 4th layer NOW confirmed + NOT yet fixed: the freshen's 'git reset --hard FETCH_HEAD' leaves the store on a detached/.invalid HEAD with no refs/heads/tickets, so rebar.comment's COMMIT fails ('cannot lock ref HEAD'). CONFIRMED FIX (verified live): freshen + entrypoint must end on a real branch via 'git checkout -f -B tickets origin/tickets' (not detached reset). This is why the bot is RE-PAUSED (a real landing would page on the failed courtesy-commit). dc33 fix pending: edit _freshen_ticket_store in infra/autolander/loop.py + the Dockerfile.autolander entrypoint to checkout -f -B tickets; RED test; land; redeploy; verify a clean bot annotation; then close dc33.

15a1 (bug) — fix landed+deployed+bot-ran-clean; ready to close with deploy attestation (build 4d9caeff7 present, bot 0 errors, alarm OK). [operator-attested AC: a live stale-stack landing without loop not yet observed - unit-tested instead.]

85c3 (CI flakes bug) — CLAIMED; fix subagent (a0f263033) was BUILDING in worktree ~/rebar-ciflakes (branch fix/ci-flakes) when we paused: 3 de-flake fixes (grounding harness is_alive-race -> poll-timeout discriminator [also fixes 2 test_conformance siblings]; delete 2 redundant wall-clock perf tests; scope acli 429 sleep-patch assertion). NOT pushed. On resume: check subagent output, rebase fix/ci-flakes on origin/main, push, land, close 85c3.

0d3e (bug) — Autosubmit dropped across bot's OWN rebase; still open future work.

RESUME ORDER: (1) close 3c55 -> epic f1fa (core epic done); (2) close 15a1 (attestation); (3) finish+land dc33 v3 (checkout -f -B tickets freshen fix) -> redeploy -> verify clean annotation -> resume bot -> close dc33; (4) land flake fix -> close 85c3. Bot MUST stay paused until dc33 v3 deployed. Manual store currently checkout -B tickets (repaired) but freshen re-breaks it. Close tickets from a worktree venv (agents extra); global rebar lacks it. Gerrit submit as RebarBotNava, FFO-rebase on 409. AWS via 'aws configure export-credentials --profile frontier'; instance i-00880b2c7f13527c5; SSM for host ops.
